description: A vertical graphic over a blurred photograph of a wooden judge's gavel and a brass scale in front of a U.S. flag, the image darkened. White text in the upper half reads Citizenship is a privilege for those who obey our laws, with privilege and obey our laws in italics. A Department of Homeland Security seal and the words U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services appear below the text.
notable_text: Citizenship is a privilege for those who obey our laws; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
